h3.style: max-width: 90%; margin: 5% auto 0 auto; font-weight:bold; font-size: 30px; color: #3074bc; padding: 10px;

table.style: width: 100%; margin-top: 26%; border: 1px solid #000; border-collapse: collapse;font-family: 'Abyssinica SIL', serif;font-weight:bold;font-size: 17px;

td.style: width: 14%; padding-left: 10px; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000; color: #3074bc;vertical-align: top;
width: 43%;padding-left: 10px; border: 1px solid #000;color: #3074bc;vertical-align: top;
width: 27%;padding-left: 10px; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000; color: #3074bc;vertical-align: top;
padding-left: 10px; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000; color: #3074bc;vertical-align: top;
padding-left: 10px; border: 1px solid #000; color: #3074bc;vertical-align: top;
padding-left: 10px; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000; color: #3074bc;vertical-align: top;
padding-left: 10px; border: 1px solid #000; color: #3074bc;vertical-align: top;
padding-left:10px;font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000; color: #3074bc;vertical-align: top;
padding-left:10px;border: 1px solid #000; color: #3074bc;vertical-align: top;
padding-left: 10px; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000; color: #3074bc;vertical-align: top;
padding-left: 10px; border: 1px solid #000; color: #3074bc;vertical-align: top;

table.style: text-align: center; margin-top: 32px; font-size: 17px; color: #28648c; font-family: 'Abyssinica SIL', serif; border-collapse: collapse; width: 100%;

td.style: color: #28648c;

tr.td:
This document contains a formal proposal. When both parties sign this proposal, it forms a
legally binding contract that guarantees the success of the project through our service delivery
standards and your seamless co-operation.

link.p:
Maintenance Service Division of M/s
, a U.S Certified Pool Operator [CPO® Certification No. C-010717], is fully equipped to manage the operations and maintenance of your swimming pool / water features with world-class standards and expertise as follows:-

ul.li: CPO-US Certified swimming operations to ensure water quality and asset maintenance standards.
14 years of experience in swimming pool maintenance and trained staff.
Value-added service team to ensure the reactive maintenance 24/7.
Trading support for the timely delivery of genuine consumables and spares.
Multi-layer supervision and service quality audits.
Key Account manager for all communications.
Asset condition survey reporting and monthly reporting.
Flexible timing according to client demand.
Customized uniform according to client preferences.
Environment-friendly chemicals are available on customer demand without any additional cost.

div.style: display: flex; align-items: center; border: 1px solid white; font-size: 17px;

td.style: text-align: justify;border: 1px solid white; vertical-align: top;padding-right:35px;
td.p: Puresan is a saturated ionic complex biochemical solution containing copper-, silver-, zinc-, and aluminium nitrate. We use this in the pools maintained by us which helps to reduce the chlorine usage. The merits of using Puresan are as follows:-

ul.li: Healthy and eco-friendly water treatment for the pool.
Drastic reduction in chlorine exposure and its irritating and harmful effects.

td.style: border: 1px solid white; text-align: right; vertical-align: top;

table.style: text-align: justify; margin-left: -6px; margin-top: 10px; font-size: 17px; line-height: 20px; font-family: 'Abyssinica SIL', serif; border-collapse: collapse; width: 100%;

td.style: padding-right: 14px; vertical-align: top;

div.h6: . Detailed scope of work and specification: -

table.style: width: 800px; margin-left: 42px;margin-top: 5px; border: 1px solid #000;font-size: 17px; border-collapse: collapse;font-family: 'Abyssinica SIL', serif;

td.style: width: 30%; padding: 10px; font-size: 17px; text-align:center;font-family: 'Noto Serif', serif; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000; background-color:#c8dcec;
width: 70%; padding: 10px; font-size: 17px; text-align:center;font-family: 'Noto Serif', serif; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000; background-color:#c8dcec;

t.t-value:
'
'.join([line.asset_action for line in o.amc_asset_details if line.sl_no == asset_line.sl_no])

td.style: padding: 10px; font-size: 16px; text-align:left; border: 1px solid #000;
padding: 10px; font-size: 16px; text-align:left; border: 1px solid #000;

table.style: width: 800px; font-size: 17px; margin-left: 42px;margin-top: 35px; border: 1px solid #000; border-collapse: collapse;font-family: 'Abyssinica SIL', serif;

td.style: width: 70%; padding: 10px; text-align:left;font-family: 'Noto Serif', serif; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000; background-color:#c8dcec;
width: 30%; padding: 10px; text-align:center;font-family: 'Noto Serif', serif; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000; background-color:#c8dcec;
width: 70%; padding: 10px; text-align:left; border: 1px solid #000;
width: 30%; padding: 10px; text-align:right; border: 1px solid #000;
width: 70%; padding: 10px; text-align:left; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000;
width: 30%; padding: 10px; text-align:left; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000;
width: 70%; padding: 10px; text-align:left; border: 1px solid #000;
width: 30%; padding: 10px; text-align:center; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000;
width: 70%; padding: 10px; text-align:left; border: 1px solid #000;

t.t-foreach: o.pricing_structure_ids.filtered(lambda l: l.pool_structure_sl_no == pool.pool_specification_sl_no and l.is_consumables)

td.style: width: 30%; padding: 10px; text-align:center; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000;
width: 70%; padding: 10px; text-align:left; border: 1px solid #000;
width: 30%; padding: 10px; text-align:center; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000;
width: 70%; padding: 10px; text-align:left; border: 1px solid #000;

t.t-foreach: o.pricing_structure_ids.filtered(lambda l: l.pool_structure_sl_no == pool.pool_specification_sl_no and l.is_manpower)

td.style: width: 30%; padding: 10px; text-align:center; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000;
width: 70%; padding: 10px; text-align:right; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000;
width: 30%; padding: 10px; text-align:right; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000;
width: 70%; padding: 10px; text-align:right; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000;
width: 30%; padding: 10px; text-align:right; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000;
width: 70%; padding: 10px; text-align:right; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000;
width: 30%; padding: 10px; text-align:right; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000;
width: 70%; padding: 10px; text-align:right; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000;
width: 30%; padding: 10px; text-align:right; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000;
width: 70%; padding: 10px; text-align:right; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000;
width: 30%; padding: 10px; text-align:right; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000;
width: 70%; padding: 10px; text-align:left; font-weight: bold; border: 1px solid #000; background-color:#b0cce4;

table.style: font-size: 17px;margin-left:-9px;margin-top: 5px; font-size: 16px; font-family: 'Abyssinica SIL', serif; border-collapse: collapse;

td.style: padding-right: 19px; vertical-align: top;font-size: 17px;
font-size: 17px;text-align: justify;word-spacing:-5px;

tr.td:
The “AMC” scope of work “EXCLUDES” the following other than warranty provided by “M/s
”:

link.p: .Work Order Confirmation. By signing this contract both parties agree to all the terms and conditions mentioned above.

table.style: font-size:15px; width: 100%; margin-top: 20px;font-size: 17px; border-collapse: collapse;font-family: 'Abyssinica SIL', serif;

td.style: width: 50%; vertical-align: top; padding-right: 20px;
width: 50%; vertical-align: top; padding-left: 110px;

p.b: This is digitally signed, signature and stamp not required
CRYSTAL CLEAR SPARKLING BLUE SWIMMING POOLS BEGIN WITH KPF
